title: oporinia autumnalis var. simplex
intro: Oporinia autumnalis var. simplex, also known as autumnal gentian or lesser gentian, is a plant species belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae) characterized by its yellow flowers and narrow leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its bitter compounds that stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of oporinia autumnalis var. simplex include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, support liver function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and capsules, often used to promote digestive health and relieve symptoms of indigestion.
